message:
test(asserts): [7k7pl batch 7] pin connector timestamps + title truncation content

Upgrade 5 presence-only assertions in the remaining connector tests
(chatgpt, aider, codex, cline) to pin exact timestamps + title
content, so regressions producing 0/MIN timestamps or wrong-length
titles fail loudly.

- connector_chatgpt.rs (scan_parses_mapping_format): pin
  started_at/ended_at to exact ms-epoch values derived from the
  seeded create_time (1700000000.0s → 1_700_000_000_000ms), catching
  precision-loss or dropped-conversion regressions.
- connector_aider.rs (aider_timestamps_from_mtime): pin both
  timestamps to `>= 1_000_000_000_000` (plausible ms-epoch) and
  `started == ended`, catching zero/MIN regressions.
- connector_codex.rs (codex_connector_reads_modern_envelope_jsonl):
  pin started >= 2020 and started < ended, catching dropped
  ISO-8601 parsing.
- connector_codex.rs (codex_connector_truncates_long_title): pin
  truncated title = 100 × 'A' (not just length 100), catching
  multi-byte boundary corruption.
- connector_cline.rs (title truncation test): collapse
  `.is_some()` + `.unwrap().len() == 100` into a single
  `assert_eq!(..., Some(100))`.

Verified green: 90 chatgpt + 15 aider + 26 cline + 27 codex tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
